description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof, surrounded by a neatly trimmed hedge and several trees. The exterior is primarily light gray with large, floor-to-ceiling windows that provide ample natural light to the interior. The front features a driveway leading to a garage, a main entrance with a small overhang, and a pathway lined with stepping stones. The backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool, a patio area with lounge chairs, and landscaped greenery. The house has a minimalist design with clean lines and an open layout, emphasizing outdoor living spaces. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, and the overall structure is boxy and geometric.
description: A modern, boxy two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and a backyard pool, surrounded by hedges and trees. The design is minimalist with clean lines and ample outdoor living space.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front and left side of the house, highlighting the driveway, main entrance, and a portion of the backyard with the pool and patio.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the rear of the house, focusing on the backyard, pool, patio, and large windows opening to the outdoor area.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the right side and rear, emphasizing the pool, hedge boundary, and the geometric structure of the house.
description_view_3: View 3 is a direct front view, showcasing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and the symmetrical landscaping with trees and hedges.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, glass door, and a short walkway with stepping stones leading from the driveway
